scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "LANDING,COURSES" --prefix-colors "blueBright,greenBright" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix courses-page"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix courses-page
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others --names "LANDING,COURSES" --prefix-colors "blueBright,greenBright" "npm run start --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix courses-page"
